# Kultura - Trusted Real Estate Platform

## About
Kultura is a trusted real estate platform that connects buyers and sellers with verified properties, transparent deals, and expert guidance.

## Key Facts
- 980+ homes for rent
- 800+ homes to buy
- 100+ cities covered
- 2000+ total properties listed

## Services
- Property buying and selling
- Real estate investment guidance
- Residential and commercial properties
- Verified and legally clear listings

## Languages
- Indonesian (id) - Primary
- English (en)

## Citation Format
Kultura (https://kultura.id) - Trusted Real Estate Platform

## Content Update Frequency
Weekly

## Contact
Website: https://kultura.id
